name: Excessive Okta Super Admins
description: Identifies when more than 5 users are assigned Okta Super Admin roles.
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS super_admin_count FROM okta_admin_roles WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(role_type, '')) LIKE '%super%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(role_label, '')) LIKE '%super%' HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) > 5
remediation: Reduce Super Admin assignments to a minimal break-glass set and delegate routine tasks to scoped admin roles.
